# Test PRD-01: Simple Greeting Model\n\n## Goal\nCreate a basic Greeting model, factory, and test for decomposition validation.\n\n## Requirements\n\n### Functional\n- Create `app/models/greeting.rb` with `message:string` field\n- Add validations: presence and length (1-255)\n- Create factory `:greeting`\n- Create `test/models/greeting_test.rb` with:\n  - `test_validates_presence`\n  - `test_validates_length`\n  - `test_factory_creates_valid_record`\n\n### Non-Functional\n- Follow Rails 8 conventions (frozen_string_literal, scopes if applicable)\n- 100% test coverage\n- RuboCop clean\n\n### Acceptance Criteria\n- [ ] Model saves with valid message\n- [ ] Rejects blank message\n- [ ] Rejects message >255 chars\n- [ ] Factory works\n- [ ] 3 tests pass
